repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five memories are from similar ca6k_xxxxx ops in the same torch#1 category. They cover two common failure patterns for custom AscendC operators: TilingFunc setter errors (ca6k_00188, ca6k_00246, ca6k_00262) and redefinition of operator class in op_proto.h (ca6k_00227, ca6k_00322). These issues are likely to recur for ca6k_00071 given the shared code generation template.
